title: Bloomberg: '김정은의 핵무기가 트럼프로부터 그를 보호한다' — 고체연료 미사일, 우크라이나 실전 데이터, 집속탄·디코이 개발로 억제력 확보 분석
snippet: Kim's nuclear arms shield him from Trump. Over the past several years, Kim has pushed North Korea toward a credible nuclear strike capability against the US and its allies. Short-range ballistic missiles sent to Russia for use in Ukraine have been battle-tested, giving real-world data on how US and Western interceptors perform. This year, tested missiles with cluster bombs and decoys to penetrate defenses.
tag_reason: Bloomberg 4/29 발행 뉴스레터. 이전 7일 소스에 동일 URL 없음. src-001과 함께 Bloomberg의 대규모 북핵 커버리지의 일부이나 별도 발행물
